results.title: Cashew
results.description: A flexible and straightforward library for caching HTTP requests in Angular applications, offering features like state management mode, local/session storage support, and dynamic storage strategies.

results.title: Caddy Cache Handler
results.description: A distributed HTTP cache module for Caddy, compliant with RFC 7234, featuring a REST API, ESI tag processing, and support for various distributed cache backends.

results.title: Laravel Lang HTTP Statuses
results.description: Provides HTTP status codes for Laravel applications, offering translations and easy integration for various languages.

results.title: Sidekiq Status
results.description: Sidekiq Status is an extension to Sidekiq that tracks job information and provides a UI for monitoring job status, progress, and custom data storage.

results.title: OpenStatus
results.description: OpenStatus is an open-source global uptime monitoring platform that provides a status page and monitoring as code to track service availability and performance.

results.title: phpFastCache
results.description: A high-performance backend cache system.  It is intended for use in speeding up dynamic web applications by alleviating database load.  Well implemented, it can drops the database load to almost nothing, yielding faster page load times for users, better resource utilization.  It is simple yet powerful.

results.title: LIVCK
results.description: LIVCK is a self-hosted status page platform that monitors uptime, sends notifications across multiple channels, and provides customizable status dashboards with features like alerts, badges, and progressive web app support.

results.title: OpenStatus
results.description: 🏓  The open-source synthetic monitoring platform  🏓

results.title: Cached Query
results.description: Cached Query is a collection of Dart and Flutter libraries that cache asynchronous function responses, inspired by React query tools, to enhance user experience with fast data retrieval.

results.title: Cached Network Image
results.description: A Flutter library designed to display images from the internet and efficiently store them in a cache directory, supporting placeholders and error widgets.

results.title: Hatchet
results.description: Hatchet is a platform for running background tasks at scale, offering a durable task queue, workflow management, and real-time monitoring for complex background operations.

results.title: Ceph Cheatsheet
results.description: A comprehensive cheatsheet compiling knowledge and recommendations for operating and managing Ceph distributed storage clusters.

results.title: Faraday HTTP Cache
results.description: A Faraday middleware that respects HTTP cache by checking expiration and validation of stored responses.

results.title: Spatie Laravel Responsecache
results.description: This Laravel package caches entire responses to speed up applications. It automatically caches successful GET requests returning text-based content, significantly reducing response times by serving saved responses on subsequent identical requests.

results.title: Cachified
results.description: 🤑 wrap virtually everything that can store by key to act as cache with ttl/max-age, stale-while-validate, parallel fetch protection and type-safety support

results.title: Memcached
results.description: docs site

results.title: Cache Extensions
results.description: This GitHub Action caches PHP extensions to speed up build processes in GitHub Actions, working alongside setup-php and actions/cache.

results.title: Squid Web Proxy Cache
results.description: Squid is a high-performance web proxy cache that speeds up web access by caching frequently requested web pages.

results.title: iChat
results.description: 即时通讯系统

results.title: Dash Cheatsheets
results.description: A repository containing Dash cheat sheets that can be installed, modified, or added to, with instructions provided for creating custom cheat sheets using cheatset.

results.title: Cat Catch
results.description: Cat Catch is a resource sniffing extension that helps you filter and list resources on the current page, available for Chrome, Edge, Firefox, and Android.

results.title: Cache APT Packages Action
results.description: This GitHub Action caches Advanced Package Tool (APT) package dependencies to reduce workflow execution time by avoiding repeated installations.

results.title: Concrete CMS
results.description: A collection of Concrete CMS cheat sheets, based on the V9+ source code, covering various aspects like application, superglobals, pages, files, and users.

results.title: Multilevel Cache Spring Boot Starter
results.description: A Spring Boot starter that implements a multi-level cache strategy using Caffeine (local memory) and Redis (distributed memory) for improved performance and data consistency.

results.title: Serwist
results.description: Serwist is a library designed to simplify service worker development for Progressive Web Apps (PWAs), providing tools for caching strategies, routing, background sync, and other offline capabilities.

results.title: Apollo3 Cache Persist
results.description: Simple persistence for all Apollo Client 3.0 cache implementations, including `InMemoryCache` and `Hermes`, supporting both web and React Native environments.

results.title: Fastify Caching
results.description: A Fastify plugin to facilitate working with cache headers

results.title: Varnish HTTP Cache
results.description: Varnish Cache is a high-performance HTTP accelerator, also known as a caching HTTP reverse proxy, designed for speed and scalability.

results.title: Cache Igniter
results.description: Cache Igniter is a global CDN and reverse proxy cache warmer that automatically keeps your site's cache warm, significantly improving page load times and reducing server load by ensuring content is always served from CDN edge nodes.
